calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for Michael Corvi. Gary Corvi in Propria Persona.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Aguerre.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Continued To Oct-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for Michael Corvi. Gary Corvi in Propria Persona.

The Accounting Petition was continued to October 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Corvi to file written objection. The objection is to be filed by noon Wednesday September 28, 2011.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (160 Denslowe Drive, San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Apr-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for Michael Corvi (Trustee).

The Court stated that it received the Notice of Waiver from the Buyers. The sale was confirmed at $665,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $505,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

First Report And Account Of Sole Successor Trustee; Petition For Its Allowance And Approval; For Reduction Of Bond; For Allowance Of Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced To Attorneys For Sole Successor Trustee And For Lien
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 286312. Kelly Dixon appearing for former temporary conservator and sole successos trustee Michael Corvi. Counsel has received the letter that the beneficiary wrote to the Court. No appearance to object. Both petitions are granted. Two orders signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Omar deLeon.
